global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo, product images, and a strong call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo featuring the text 'LuxShelf' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A visual representation of three product images with a clean, minimalistic design, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Product image
elements.description: A single product image displayed in a rectangular frame, showcasing a sleek design and appealing colors.

elements.label: Product image
elements.description: Another product image in a similar rectangular frame, maintaining a consistent aesthetic with the previous image.

elements.label: Product image
elements.description: A third product image, also in a rectangular frame, completing the trio of product displays.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, inviting text stating 'Your next favorite pick Shop bestsellers now' in a prominent position at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: LuxShelf headline
elements.description: The headline 'LuxShelf' is displayed in a large, eye-catching font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Start now' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Product price
elements.description: The price '€9.99' is displayed in a clear, bold font, positioned near the call to action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalistic and modern, LuxShelf logo, product images, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by product images in the center, and the main message and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your next favorite pick, Shop bestsellers now, LuxShelf, Start now, €9.99
